allowlist.name: my-custom-skill
allowlist.rationale: Custom skill not in repo but intentionally added by user

allowlist.name: my-custom-agent.md
allowlist.rationale: Custom agent not in repo but intentionally added by user

validationRules.rule-1: Every stale/extra entry MUST have a rationale
validationRules.rule-2: Every entry MUST have an expiry date (null = permanent)
validationRules.rule-3: Expired entries MUST be removed or renewed
validationRules.rule-4: CI MUST fail on stale/extra entries without allowlist in strict mode
validationRules.rule-5: Max staleness threshold is configurable via maxStalenessDays
